steps.title: Identify the general-to-specific structure
steps.content: The first sentence states a general principle: energy transfers across trophic levels. The sentence after the blank provides a specific illustration—it names actual organisms and traces how energy flows through them.

steps.title: Apply to choices
steps.content: For example transitions from a general principle to a specific illustration. The second sentence delivers exactly this: it traces energy through particular organisms (plants → herbivores → carnivores), demonstrating how the principle works. Likewise, However, and By contrast all misrepresent the relationship by suggesting similarity, contradiction, or opposition rather than illustration. This matches choice C — C is correct.
